title: Fresh & Farm
description: A vanilla++ modpack for a personal server. Combines many animal and farming mods with Fresh Animation for a cute, relaxed experience.
body:
## Fresh & Farm

![The player sitting in front of a villager's house. Their eyes are blinking.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12d25951eef660e41566838e79ccbec92721a282.png)
(•ᴗ<˶)✧₊ ⊹

---
### Intro:

I made this modpack for a personal server. I was very inspired by "Actions and Stuff" and the Fresh Animation mods, and I wanted to make a cozy farming experience (with lots of cute animals).

---
### Contents:

- Lots of performance mods (Sodium, Iris, C2M, Noisium)
- QoL mods (Screenshot Viewer, Better Third Person, AppleSkin)
- Enviromnent particles (Particular, Particle Rain, Subtle Effects)
- Sounds!! (AmbientSounds, Sounds, Sound Physics Remastered)
- More animations (Fresh Animation resource packs, Eating Animation)
- YUNG mods + Let's Do Mods + Farmer's Delight + Create
- Animal mods (Naturalist, Fowl Play, Hybrid Aquatic)
- World Generation (Terralith, CTOV)
- and more...
